---
name: Documentation / methodology feedback
about: Correct a doc drift, ambiguity, missing guidance, or methodology gap
title: "[doc] "
labels: ["type:doc", "triage"]
---

<!--
Use this template for:
- A document contradicts another document in the repo (SoT drift).
- A document is unclear, ambiguous, or missing information you needed.
- A methodology step is missing for a common real-world situation.
- A diagram or example is out of sync with text.

If something in the repo is technically broken (script fails, schema rejects
valid input, hook exits wrong code), use the Bug report template instead.
-->

## Which document(s)

<!-- Paste paths. Multiple paths = cross-doc drift; call that out explicitly. -->

- `docs/…`

## What's wrong / missing / ambiguous

<!-- Quote the offending text. If it's a drift, quote BOTH sides so reviewers
     can see the conflict without opening three tabs. -->

```
…
```

## What the doc should say instead (your proposal)

<!-- Even a rough sketch helps. Optional, but it makes resolution faster. -->

## Why this matters

<!-- Who hits this ambiguity, in what situation, and what bad outcome
     happens when they act on the current wording? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Related issues, PRs, or past conversations. Stack bridge requests
     have their own template — use "Stack bridge request" instead. -->
